# NineScrolls

> Research-grade semiconductor equipment provider. We build plasma etching systems (RIE/ICP) and thin-film deposition systems (ALD, PECVD, HDP-CVD), plus plasma cleaners for surface preparation. This file gives LLMs a concise, linkable map of high-value resources.

NineScrolls serves universities, research institutes, and corporate R&D labs worldwide. For questions or corrections, contact info@ninescrolls.com. Canonical host is https://ninescrolls.com/.

## Docs

- [Sitemap](https://ninescrolls.com/sitemap.xml): Index of all public pages
- [Robots](https://ninescrolls.com/robots.txt): Crawl rules
- [Full content for LLMs](https://ninescrolls.com/llms-full.txt): Extended machine-readable content with product specs, article summaries, and FAQs
- [Service Process Guide (PDF)](https://ninescrolls.com/docs/NineScrolls_Service_Process_Guide.pdf): Warranty / service overview

## Products — Etching Systems

- [RIE Etcher](https://ninescrolls.com/products/rie-etcher): Reactive ion etching systems for Si, SiO2, SiNx, polymers
- [ICP Etcher](https://ninescrolls.com/products/icp-etcher): Inductively coupled plasma etching for high-aspect-ratio features
- [Compact RIE](https://ninescrolls.com/products/compact-rie): Space-efficient RIE for smaller labs
- [IBE/RIBE Systems](https://ninescrolls.com/products/ibe-ribe): Ion/reactive ion beam etching for metals and complex materials
- [Striper Systems](https://ninescrolls.com/products/striper): Photoresist removal / ashing

## Products — Deposition Systems

- [ALD Systems](https://ninescrolls.com/products/ald): Atomic layer deposition for conformal thin films
- [PECVD Systems](https://ninescrolls.com/products/pecvd): Plasma-enhanced chemical vapor deposition
- [HDP-CVD Systems](https://ninescrolls.com/products/hdp-cvd): High-density plasma CVD for gap-fill applications
- [Sputter Systems](https://ninescrolls.com/products/sputter): PVD sputtering for metal and dielectric films

## Products — Lithography

- [Coater/Developer](https://ninescrolls.com/products/coater-developer): Photolithography track equipment

## Products — Plasma Cleaners

- [Plasma Cleaners Overview](https://ninescrolls.com/products/plasma-cleaner): HY and PLUTO series overview
- [Plasma Cleaner Comparison](https://ninescrolls.com/products/plasma-cleaner/compare): Side-by-side spec comparison
- [HY-4L](https://ninescrolls.com/products/hy-4l): Compact RF/MF plasma cleaner (~4L), from $6,499
- [HY-20L](https://ninescrolls.com/products/hy-20l): Research-grade batch plasma cleaner (20L), from $11,999
- [HY-20LRF](https://ninescrolls.com/products/hy-20lrf): Integrated RF vacuum plasma cleaner (20L), from $14,499
- [PLUTO-T](https://ninescrolls.com/products/pluto-t): 200W RF plasma cleaner (~4.3L), $9,999
- [PLUTO-M](https://ninescrolls.com/products/pluto-m): 200W RF plasma cleaner (~8L), $12,999
- [PLUTO-F](https://ninescrolls.com/products/pluto-f): 500W RF flagship plasma cleaner (~14.5L), $15,999

## Insights — Etching Guides

- [Reactive Ion Etching (RIE) Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/reactive-ion-etching-guide): Complete guide to RIE principles, process control, system types, and equipment selection
- [Deep Reactive Ion Etching (DRIE) – Bosch Process](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/deep-reactive-ion-etching-bosch-process): DRIE fundamentals, Bosch process cycles (passivation/etch parameters), MEMS/TSV/photonics applications, defects (scalloping, ARDE, notching, grass), cryogenic DRIE comparison
- [ICP-RIE Technology](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/icp-rie-technology-advanced-etching): How ICP differs from conventional RIE, benefits for deep/high-AR etching
- [RIE vs. Ion Milling](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/reactive-ion-etching-vs-ion-milling): In-depth comparison of RIE and ion milling with quantitative etch rates, DRIE/Bosch and RIBE hybrid techniques, material compatibility tables, and decision flowchart
- [Semiconductor Etchers Overview](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/semiconductor-etchers-overview): How to choose the right etcher for your lab
- [PE vs. RIE vs. ICP-RIE](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/understanding-differences-pe-rie-icp-rie-plasma-etching): Comparison of three plasma etching modes
- [Plasma Etching Fundamentals](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/plasma-etching-explained-fundamentals-applications): From basics to applications in semiconductor manufacturing
- [Plasma Non-Uniformity Solutions](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/plasma-non-uniform-etch-chamber-solutions): Causes and fixes for non-uniform plasma in etch chambers
- [Atomic Layer Etching (ALE) Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/atomic-layer-etching-practical-guide): Comprehensive ALE guide — self-limiting cyclic etch, energy windows, Si/SiO2/III-V/metal chemistries, ICP-RIE implementation, cryogenic and area-selective ALE
- [Cryogenic Etching vs. Bosch Process](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/cryogenic-etching-vs-bosch-process): In-depth comparison of cryogenic plasma etching and Bosch DRIE for high-aspect-ratio silicon — sidewall smoothness, aspect ratios, equipment retrofit, hybrid approaches, photonics/MEMS/quantum applications
- [ML for Plasma Etch Optimization](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/machine-learning-plasma-etch-optimization): Practical guide to ML in plasma etching — Bayesian optimization, virtual metrology with OES, endpoint detection, digital twins, predictive maintenance, Python code examples, data management best practices
- [Etching Beyond Silicon](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/etching-beyond-silicon-new-materials): Plasma processing of emerging materials — SiC, GaN, 2D materials (MoS2), high-k dielectrics (HfO2), interconnect metals (Ru/Co/Mo), ferroelectrics (HZO/PZT), surface chemistry, etch product volatility, damage mitigation
- [Ultra-High Etch Selectivity](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/ultra-high-etch-selectivity): Comprehensive selectivity guide — chemical/ion-energy/passivation/temperature mechanisms, 7 strategies (gas chemistry, bias, pressure, pulsed plasma, ALE, temperature, multi-step), 5 case studies (3D NAND, HEMT, GAA, MEMS, photonics), ARDE effects, EUV/BPDN/CFET trends
- [Plasma Cleaner Maintenance Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/plasma-cleaner-maintenance-guide): Practical maintenance guide — chamber cleaning, electrode refurbishment (NaOH/H2SO4 chemical process), vacuum system upkeep, RF power checks, preventive schedules (daily through annual), troubleshooting, safety warnings
- [Future of Plasma Etching](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/future-of-plasma-etching-microelectronics): Comprehensive roadmap for next-generation plasma etching — ALE (thermal and plasma-enhanced, 0.5-2 A/cycle EPC), pulsed plasma techniques (synchronous/asynchronous modes, 100 Hz-10 kHz), HAR etching for 3D NAND and DRAM (>50:1 AR, ARDE/bowing/twisting mitigation), low-damage processing, EUV resist removal, cryogenic etching (-100 to +250C), AI-assisted process control with OES/ML, equipment implications and adoption guidance
- [Dry Etching Thermoelectric Films](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/dry-etching-thermoelectric-films-ch4-h2-ar-plasma-optimization): CH4/H2/Ar plasma optimization for Bi2Te3 microstructures
- [Ion Beam Etching (IBE) & RIBE Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/ion-beam-etching-ribe-guide): Complete IBE/RIBE guide — Kaufman vs RF ion sources, IBE/RIBE/CAIBE modes, tilt angle optimization, material compatibility (magnetic, optical, metals), MRAM/photonics/MEMS applications, comparison with RIE
- [Wafer Loading Effect in Plasma Etching](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/wafer-loading-effect-plasma-etching): Macro loading, micro loading, and ARDE — causes, quantitative models, and mitigation strategies for etch rate non-uniformity
- [III-V Compound Semiconductor Etching Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/iii-v-compound-semiconductor-etching-guide): Plasma etching of GaAs, InP, GaN, AlGaN, InGaAs, GaSb — gas chemistries (Cl₂, BCl₃, SiCl₄, CH₄/H₂), selectivity, damage mitigation, equipment selection for photonics/RF/power/quantum
- [Diamond Semiconductor Processing](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/diamond-semiconductor-processing-icp-etching-deposition): Diamond UWBG semiconductor — CVD growth, ICP plasma etching optimization, thin-film deposition, doping strategies, device architectures, quantum device fabrication

## Insights — Deposition & Materials

- [Atomic Layer Deposition (ALD) Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/atomic-layer-deposition-ald-comprehensive-guide): Comprehensive ALD guide — self-limiting chemistry, thermal vs PEALD, temperature windows, precursor selection, ALD vs CVD vs PVD comparison, applications in semiconductors/MEMS/energy, equipment selection
- [Magnetron Sputtering Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/magnetron-sputtering-guide): Complete sputtering guide — DC vs RF modes, reactive sputtering for oxides/nitrides, process parameters, film growth modes, quality optimization, equipment selection for 4"–12" wafers
- [PECVD Complete Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/pecvd-complete-guide-plasma-enhanced-cvd): PECVD handbook — parallel-plate reactor principles, single vs dual-frequency RF stress control, SiO₂/SiNₓ/a-Si:H/SiC/DLC recipes, PECVD vs LPCVD vs ALD comparison, applications and equipment selection
- [PECVD vs ALD vs Sputtering Comparison](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/pecvd-vs-ald-vs-sputtering-comparison): Decision guide comparing three major deposition technologies — performance metrics, material applicability, process trade-offs, and application-specific recommendations
- [HDP-CVD In-Depth Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/hdp-cvd-in-depth-guide-practical-handbook): Comprehensive HDP-CVD handbook for research and manufacturing
- [HDP-CVD Applications](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/hdp-cvd-applications-gap-fill-dielectrics): Gap fill, STI, IMD/PMD applications — dep/etch competition mechanism, void-free fill strategies, HDP-CVD vs PECVD vs SACVD comparison, advanced packaging
- [Advanced Materials Processing](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/advanced-materials-processing-nanotechnology-energy): Thin film deposition and plasma etching for materials science
- [Nanofabrication Techniques](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/nanofabrication-techniques-nanoscale-future): E-beam lithography, nanoimprint, self-assembly
- [Photonics Manufacturing](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/photonics-manufacturing-precision-engineering): Precision engineering for optical devices

## Insights — Lithography

- [Spin Coating & Development Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/spin-coating-development-guide): Complete photoresist processing guide — spin coating physics, thickness vs speed, photoresist selection (positive/negative, DNQ, SU-8, PMMA), lithography process flow, development optimization, troubleshooting
- [Coater/Developer Equipment Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/coater-developer-systems-equipment-guide): Track system selection — module configurations, spin coating equipment vs manual, developer module design, hotplate integration, recipe programming, uniformity optimization, defect troubleshooting
- [Lithography Process Integration](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/lithography-process-integration-guide): Full lithography-to-etch flow — substrate prep, HMDS, coating, exposure, development, pattern transfer, resist strip, CD control, process integration challenges
- [Hard Mask Processing: Materials, Integration, and Pattern Transfer Strategies](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/hard-mask-processing-materials-integration-and-pattern-transfer-strategies): Hard mask selection and integration for deep/selective etches — SiO₂, SiNₓ, amorphous carbon, metal hard masks (Cr, Ti, TiN, Al, W), DLC; deposition methods (PECVD, ALD, sputter, evaporation), mask opening chemistries, selectivity budgeting, stress and adhesion control, mask removal (wet strip, plasma ash, CMP), troubleshooting sidewall roughness, undercut, mask erosion

## Insights — Stripping & Ashing

- [Plasma Stripping & Ashing Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/plasma-stripping-ashing-guide): Comprehensive stripping guide — O₂ plasma chemistry, downstream vs direct plasma, dry vs wet strip comparison, gas chemistry selection, process types (PR strip, descum, surface activation, 2D materials), equipment selection
- [Stripping Equipment Selection Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/plasma-stripping-equipment-selection-guide): Equipment architectures (barrel/downstream/RIE-mode), gas chemistry selection, temperature effects, endpoint detection, batch vs single-wafer, striper vs plasma cleaner decision guide
- [Post-Etch Cleaning & Residue Removal](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/post-etch-cleaning-residue-removal): Post-etch residue types, dry/wet cleaning methods, damage-free strategies for low-k/Cu/III-V, in-situ vs ex-situ integration, contamination monitoring

## Insights — Plasma Cleaning

- [What Is a Plasma Cleaner?](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/what-is-plasma-cleaner-principles-types): Principles, types (RF/DC/microwave), and how plasma cleaning works
- [Plasma Cleaner Applications](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/plasma-cleaner-applications-guide): Semiconductor, biomedical, optics, automotive, and materials science use cases
- [Plasma Cleaner Buying Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/plasma-cleaner-buying-guide): Step-by-step selection guide covering chamber sizing, vacuum systems, and TCO
- [Plasma Cleaner Comparison](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/plasma-cleaner-comparison-research-labs): Quartz vs stainless steel, RF vs mid-frequency, brand comparison
- [PLUTO vs HY Plasma Cleaners](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/pluto-vs-hy-plasma-cleaner-comparison): Head-to-head comparison — RF vs mid-frequency, chamber architecture, power density, electrode design, application matching, cost-of-ownership, decision flowchart

## Insights — Equipment Fundamentals

- [Vacuum System Fundamentals](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/vacuum-system-fundamentals-semiconductor): Vacuum regimes, pump technologies, pressure measurement, gas flow regimes, conductance calculations, leak detection, load-lock design, vacuum materials, maintenance
- [Process Chamber Materials & Contamination Control](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/process-chamber-materials-contamination-control): Chamber body materials, surface treatments, electrode materials, seals, contamination sources, chamber seasoning, PM schedules, cleaning protocols, qualification criteria
- [RIE & ICP System Maintenance & Troubleshooting](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/rie-icp-system-maintenance-troubleshooting): Tiered preventive maintenance schedules, vacuum and RF power system care, troubleshooting decision trees for common faults, post-maintenance qualification protocols

## Insights — Process Integration & Applications

- [MEMS Fabrication Process Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/mems-fabrication-process-guide): Complete MEMS fabrication chain — bulk/surface micromachining, DRIE, thin-film deposition, wafer bonding, release etching, device-specific flows for accelerometers, pressure sensors, microfluidics, RF MEMS
- [Quantum Device Micro- & Nanofabrication Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/quantum-device-micro-nanofabrication-guide): Fabrication chain for superconducting qubits, spin qubits, and photonic circuits — substrate prep, thin-film deposition, lithography, pattern transfer, process integration, equipment selection
- [Wide Bandgap Semiconductor Fabrication Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/wide-bandgap-semiconductor-gan-sic-fabrication-guide): GaN & SiC power device fabrication — SiC ICP-RIE (SF₆/O₂), GaN gate recess (digital etch, low-bias ICP-RIE), PECVD SiNx passivation, ALD Al₂O₃ gate dielectrics, complete process flows for GaN HEMTs and SiC MOSFETs, equipment selection, emerging UWBG materials (β-Ga₂O₃, AlN, diamond)
- [Bio-MEMS & Microfluidic Chip Fabrication Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/bio-mems-microfluidic-chip-fabrication-guide): Bio-MEMS and microfluidic device fabrication — material selection (silicon, glass, PDMS, thermoplastics), DRIE microchannels, soft lithography & SU-8 master molds, surface functionalization (plasma activation, silane SAMs, anti-biofouling), biocompatible coatings (parylene, ALD, PECVD), bonding & packaging, organ-on-chip process flows, neural probes, droplet microfluidics, sterilization compatibility, equipment selection
- [2D Materials Device Fabrication Guide](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/2d-materials-device-fabrication-guide): Graphene, TMD (MoS₂, WS₂, WSe₂), and h-BN device fabrication — substrate preparation, CVD growth, deterministic dry transfer, low-damage ICP-RIE/ALE patterning, contact metallization (top vs edge contacts, Bi semimetal contacts), ALD gate dielectrics, van der Waals heterostructure assembly, complete process flows (MoS₂ FET, h-BN-encapsulated graphene Hall bar, MoS₂/WSe₂ photodetector), equipment selection

## Insights — Energy

- [Solar Cell Manufacturing](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/solar-cell-manufacturing-renewable-energy): Silicon wafer processing and thin film deposition for photovoltaics
- [Fuel Cell Technology](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/fuel-cell-technology-hydrogen-economy): MEA fabrication, catalyst deposition, and hydrogen economy R&D

## Insights — Publication Spotlights

- [RIE-150 Nanoforest Soft Actuator](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/rie150-nanoforest-soft-actuator): RIE-150 O₂ plasma creates nanoforest structures for humidity-powered soft actuators (ACS Applied Nano Materials, 2026)
- [PECVD-150LL & ICP-100 PtSe₂ Photodetector](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/pecvd-icp-ptse2-photodetector): PECVD + ICP enable record-speed PtSe₂/Si photodetector with 260 kHz bandwidth (Applied Surface Science, 2026)
- [RIE-150A Metasurface Color Router](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/rie150a-metasurface-color-router): RIE-150A etching enables on-chip q-BIC metasurface color router with near-unity efficiency (Light: Science & Applications, 2026)
- [ICP-200 Metasurface Flow Visualization](https://ninescrolls.com/insights/icp200-metasurface-flow-visualization): ICP-200 fabricates Si nanopillars for first fully non-invasive 2D flow visualization (Light: Science & Applications, 2025)
